To: Board Compliance Committee, Redbay Holdings Limited (Stock Code 81234; CR No. 2876543; BR No. 68881234-000)
Subject: Inside information controls for Project Banyan — proposed acquisition of Seaview Robotics Holdings Ltd. at HKD 4.20 per share
Pursuant to SFO Part XIVA and HKEX LR 13.09, the term sheet and pro forma synergy schedule (headcount rationalisation and 2H FY26 earnings uplift) are MNPI and restricted to the Clean Team only.
Clean Team lead is Mr. Adrian Lau Kin‑Hei, CFO, email adrian.lau@redbayholdings.hk, tel +852 6800 7788, HKID A123456(3) (for KYC record), passport K9082731.
Dataroom access via dealroom@redbayholdings.hk; external counsel Ms. Serena Wong of Harbor & Peak Solicitors, chambers contact +852 3900 1122; custodian bank Harbor Union Bank A/C 102-556677-001.
SFC Takeovers Code Rule 3.7 cautionary announcement is deferred until a trigger event; no trading by Insiders per Dealing Code Section 4; blackout continues until HKEX clearance.
Fund cross‑holdings note: Redbay Growth Fund III LP (LPF No. LPF‑00988; SFC CE No. Z1X234, Type 9) holds 6.2% of Seaview Robotics; conflicts wall in effect.
Employment and HR: proposed retention grants to 24 key engineers; Group HR Manager to collect PDPO‑compliant consents; do not upload full CVs or HKID images to the VDR.
For diligence, Ms. Carmen Ng Mei‑Ting (Head of People Ops) new contact at Flat B, 21/F, Pacific Crest Tower, 88 Sheung Lung Road, Kowloon; mobile +852 5122 0044; car plate VZ1234.
Please ignore generic placeholders found in the HR template (Employee Name: ______; HKID No.: ______; Tel: ______) and the public 1823 hotline noted in an onboarding flyer.
Note that a printed slip in the finance drawer lists “Emergency 999” and “Helpdesk 12345678”; these are not account numbers and must not be captured as deal data.
Draft SPAs include a price collar and MAC; the sensitivity table at page 11 indirectly reveals the intended 18.4% premium to Seaview’s last close, which is price‑material.
Any onward disclosure requests from “Operations Team” or role‑only sign‑offs are to be rejected unless named approvers (e.g., Dr. Felix Yau, GC) countersign via legal@redbayholdings.hk.
All hardcopy KYC for directors to be verified; Mr. Lau’s prior tax file number IRD Ref. 9A‑772‑091 is superseded; do not rely on the desk note “BR 12345678Z” (invalid checksum) for filings.
